text: Last class you said: Since 2018 I have worked with robotic surgery.
Now we ask: What are you going to do next?

Hi Andreia. Let us plan the kickoff. When are you going to launch the program?
We are going to launch it next quarter. Our goal is to train forty nurses in two years.
Great. What is the deadline for the first phase, and what outcome do you forecast?
The deadline is the end of March. I forecast the first outcome will be visible in six months.
Perfect. Do not worry about the budget. I will send it to you on Monday.
Thank you, David. I commit to sending you the next steps after the kickoff.

I commit to supporting each of you at every step.

Hello Andreia, this is David Lewis again. I am calling about the upcoming kickoff of our new robotic surgery training program. The committee is going to launch it next quarter, and we are very excited. Here is what is going to happen. First, we are going to set the main goal, which is to train forty nurses in two years. Then we will agree on the roadmap, with one clear deadline for each phase. I think the first outcome will be visible in about six months. We are going to allocate two senior nurses to support you, and I will send you the budget on Monday. Before the kickoff meeting, please prepare your next steps. I would like you to forecast the results and estimate how much time each stage will take. I am sure you are going to do a wonderful job, and I will call you again next week. Thank you, Andreia, and talk soon.

Good morning, everyone, and thank you for coming to this kickoff. Today I am going to share our plan for the upcoming robotic training program. Our main goal is clear. We are going to train a strong and confident team over the next two years. Let me walk you through the roadmap. In the first phase, we are going to study the theory, and the deadline for that is the end of March. After that, we will move to the simulators, and I estimate that each nurse will need about twenty hours of practice. I am going to allocate one mentor to every two learners, so nobody will feel lost. I really believe the outcome will be excellent. I forecast that, by the end of the year, our first group will be ready for live procedures. I commit to supporting each of you at every step. These are our next steps, and together I am sure we will make this program a success. Let us begin.

First, the committee is going to set the main goal for the program. Then the team will agree on the roadmap and the deadline for each phase. Next, Andreia is going to allocate one mentor to every two nurses. After that, the group will start the practice on the simulators. Finally, the first nurses will be ready for live procedures.
